parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort field. Prefix with - for descending. Allowed: id, name, sku, status, created_at. Default: name

parameters.name: filter[status]
parameters.description: Filter by status (text filter). Values: active, paused, archived

parameters.name: filter[product_listings_count]
parameters.description: Filter by product listings count (numeric filter)

parameters.name: filter[search]
parameters.description: Search across id, name, and sku
